iron_deficiency_anemia.name: Iron Deficiency Anemia
iron_deficiency_anemia.description: Most common form of anemia caused by insufficient iron for hemoglobin production
follow_up_questions: Do you feel unusually tired or fatigued?
Have you noticed any unusual paleness in your skin?
Do you experience shortness of breath with minimal activity?
Have you had any recent blood loss or heavy menstrual periods?
Are you following a vegetarian or vegan diet?
Do you have difficulty concentrating or brain fog?

diabetes_mellitus_type_2.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
diabetes_mellitus_type_2.description: Metabolic disorder characterized by chronic high blood glucose due to insulin resistance
follow_up_questions: Do you experience excessive thirst or dry mouth?
Are you urinating more frequently than usual?
Have you had unexplained weight loss recently?
Do you have blurred vision or eye problems?
Do you feel tingling or numbness in your hands or feet?
Do you have a family history of diabetes?

chronic_kidney_disease.name: Chronic Kidney Disease
chronic_kidney_disease.description: Progressive loss of kidney function over months to years
follow_up_questions: Do you have swelling in your legs, ankles, or feet?
Have you noticed changes in your urine output?
Do you have a history of diabetes or high blood pressure?
Are you experiencing muscle cramps or weakness?
Do you feel nauseated or have loss of appetite?
Have you had any previous kidney problems or kidney stones?

hypothyroidism.name: Hypothyroidism
hypothyroidism.description: Underactive thyroid gland producing insufficient thyroid hormone
follow_up_questions: Do you feel unusually tired or low on energy?
Have you gained weight without changes in diet?
Do you feel cold when others are comfortable?
Have you noticed increased hair loss or dry skin?
Do you experience constipation or slow digestion?
Has your mood been low or depressed recently?

inflammatory_bowel_disease.name: Inflammatory Bowel Disease
inflammatory_bowel_disease.description: Chronic inflammation of the digestive tract including Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis
follow_up_questions: Do you have persistent diarrhea or loose stools?
Do you experience abdominal pain or cramping?
Have you noticed blood in your stool?
Have you had unexplained weight loss?
Do you have a family history of Crohn's disease or ulcerative colitis?
Are you experiencing fatigue along with digestive symptoms?

urinary_tract_infection.name: Urinary Tract Infection
urinary_tract_infection.description: Bacterial infection of the urinary system including bladder, kidneys, or urethra
follow_up_questions: Are you experiencing pain or burning when urinating?
How frequently are you urinating?
Have you noticed cloudy or foul-smelling urine?
Do you have lower abdominal or pelvic pain?
Do you have fever or chills?
Have you had UTIs before?

hepatitis.name: Hepatitis
hepatitis.description: Inflammation of the liver caused by viral infection, alcohol, or autoimmune conditions
follow_up_questions: Have you noticed yellowing of your skin or eyes?
Is your urine dark or your stool pale?
Have you had any recent exposure to blood products or IV drug use?
Do you consume alcohol regularly?
Have you traveled to areas with high hepatitis prevalence?
Are you experiencing nausea or loss of appetite?

colorectal_cancer.name: Colorectal Cancer
colorectal_cancer.description: Cancer of the colon or rectum, often preceded by polyps
follow_up_questions: Have you noticed blood in your stool?
Have there been recent changes in your bowel habits?
Have you had unexplained weight loss?
Do you have persistent abdominal pain or cramping?
Do you have a family history of colon cancer or polyps?
Are you over 50 years of age?

leukemia.name: Leukemia
leukemia.description: Cancer of the blood or bone marrow characterized by abnormal white blood cell production
follow_up_questions: Do you experience frequent infections or slow healing?
Have you noticed unusual bruising or bleeding?
Do you have swollen lymph nodes in your neck, armpits, or groin?
Are you experiencing bone or joint pain?
Do you have night sweats or unexplained fevers?
Have you had significant unexplained weight loss?
